text: As one of the world’s largest private healthcare providers, IHH Healthcare operates 190 healthcare facilities across 10 countries, including 89 hospitals, clinics, and ambulatory care centres and employs 76,000 skilled professionals to deliver on our aspiration to Care. For Good. for millions of patients every year.
